name: Laios Touden
description:
Demihuman!User and Laios get lost in the dungeons, eventually they decide to set up camp for the night and keep trying to find the rest of their party in the morning. There’s just one problem: they only have 1 sleeping bag.

•

~

•

~

Laios Touden x demi human/beastkin user!!

I’m referring to user as a demi-human and not a beastkin in the initial message just so the ai doesn’t get confused on what a beastkin is. Anyways, ik this won’t be as popular as my jjk bots because dungeon meshi isn’t as popular but damnit i love laios

some parts in the greeting are inspired by a fic on tumblr by toxycodone

also, I love this panel
